hero.headline: Bringing the Finest Taste to Indonesia
hero.subheadline: Over 50 years of craftsmanship, maintaining quality and trust for millions of consumers across the archipelago and beyond.

about.title: A Long Journey Toward Excellence
about.overview: PT Nusantara Kretek Sejahtera is one of Indonesia's largest cigarette manufacturers, operating for more than five decades. We are committed to delivering high-quality products with distinctive local flavors.
about.history: Founded in 1974, our company began as a small family business in Kediri, East Java, and has since grown into an internationally recognized company with thousands of employees.
about.vision: To become a leading cigarette manufacturer trusted globally through continuous innovation and sustainable quality.
about.mission: To produce high-quality products, empower local farming partners, and maintain sustainable social and environmental responsibility.
about.factory: Our production facilities are equipped with modern technology capable of producing millions of units daily under international quality standards.
about.process: Every stage of production, from raw material selection, fermentation, blending, to packaging, is carried out under strict supervision by our experienced expert team.
